name: Ansys, Inc.
lede: Ansys runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Pune, covering gbs and it, built over 25 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Ansys office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Ansys, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Ansys runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Pune), covering gbs and it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Ansys's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Pune, spanning gbs and it. The centers deliver IT, HR, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 24 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Ansys operate in India?
faq.a: Ansys operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Ansys have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Ansys's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Ansys run in India?
faq.a: Ansys runs gbs and it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Ansys's India GCCs?
faq.a: Ansys's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Ansys's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 24 leaders at Ansys's India centers, across IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
